PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { "gh found at: $\($gh.Source\)"; gh auth status 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 6 } else { "gh NOT installed" }; "---GIT REMOTE---"; git -C "C:\\Users\\DEERAJ\\Tradeweave" remote -v)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\gh.exe"\); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($found\) { "FOUND: $found"; & $found --version | Select-Object -First 1 } else { "gh.exe not found in common locations"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\DEERAJ\\Tradeweave"; git push -u origin master; "master exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; git push -u origin phase1-build; "phase1 exit=$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; "killed $_" } catch {} } } else { "no listener" })
